title: huperzia wohlberedtii
intro: Huperzia wohlberedtii, also known as the Huperzia or firmoss, is a species of liverwort that belongs to the family Huperziaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been associated with neuroprotective and anticancer activities. The health benefits of Huperzia wohlberedtii include its potential to improve cognitive function and protect against neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Huperzia wohlberedtii is often used in herbal preparations, including supplements and extracts, although its efficacy and safety for human consumption have not been extensively studied or confirmed.
